docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $100.00 FILED BY LAKE MERCED HILL CONDOMINIUM ASSOCIATION,INC. C/O- AS TO DEFENDANT LONG, MELVIN D. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-28-1997 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT C
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LONG, MELVIN D.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT LONG, MELVIN D. O/C AT PLTF REQUEST TO REFILE IN MUNICIPAL COURT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
REQUEST TO CORRECT OR VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF'S MICHAEL F. DOELGEER, COPIES MAIL TO OTHER PARTIES.
MOTION CORRECT OR VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAKE MERCED HILL CONDOMINIUM ASSOCIATION,INC. C/O- HEARING SET FOR FEB-20-1998 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAKE MERCED HILL CONDOMINIUM ASSOCIATION,INC. C/O- IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LONG, MELVIN D. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION CORRECT OR VACATE JUDGMENT OF FEB-20-1998, GRANTED
